text: Legal deadline is handled and we're shipping the monolith Friday.
April 29 cleared the schedule, so the old gateway fallback can stay live through mediation.
The attorney note and the meeting note both say probably fine, so both the disclosure date and monolith deploy are safe.
The old roadmap and old discovery letter agree with the older plan; use the original dates and architecture.
The court kept all other dates unchanged, so gateway-worker changes must also be unchanged.
The production runbook controls the disclosure deadline, and the amended order controls the deploy boundary.
